{"data":{"content":"### What are Telegram Bots?
- Telegram bots are special accounts that don't need a phone number.
- They can do different tasks and reply to what users say.

### How do Telegram Bots Work?
- Bots use the Telegram Bot API to function.
- Users can talk to bots by sending messages, commands, and asking questions.
- Bots can send messages, pictures, and other media back to users.

### Key Features of Telegram Bots:
- **Automation**: Bots can handle tasks that are done over and over.
- **Interactivity**: They can chat with users.
- **Integration**: Bots can link to other services and tools.

### Why Use Telegram Bots?
- They make using Telegram better for users.
- They can quickly answer questions from users.
- They help users find information and services easily.","references":[{"url":"https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/","kind":"web","title":"Python Official Tutorial"},{"url":"https://docs.python.org/3/library/","kind":"web","title":"Python Standard Library"},{"url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/","kind":"web","title":"MDN Web Docs"},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search?search=Telegram%20Mini%20Bots%20Development%20for%20Web%20Developers%20Introduction%20to%20Telegram%20Bots%20and%20Python%20Basics%20Understanding%20Telegram%20Bots%3A%20What%20They%20Are%20and%20How%20They%20Work","kind":"web","title":"Wikipedia Topic Overview"}]},"type":"TEXT","title":"Understanding Telegram Bots: What They Are and How They Work","lessonText":"Telegram bots are automated programs that interact with users on the Telegram platform."}
